chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-82 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 05-05-2025 Mr. Nasir Ali Rajput, Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w Inspector Yasir, SHO, P.S, Mehrabpur and Sp Khadim Hussain of P.S, Naushahro Feroze. **** Officials present in person submit that they have not caused any sort of harassment to the petitioners; however, they undertake that protection will be provided to the petitioners in accordance with law. Learned AAG also submits that due protection is fundamental right of the petitioners which will be provided to them, as and when required. After such statements, counsel for petitioners while expressing his satisfaction seeks disposal of instant petition. Under the circumstances, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. Office is directed to communicate copy of this order to SSP, Naushahro Feroze for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
